text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today's training session with Mejiro Bright ends
without a hitch, but instead of packing up her
things, she's standing still and staring off into the
distance.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Pant... Pant... ...Yes! I cut seconds off my time!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It looks like she's watching Mejiro Dober's
training session from afar. She sure is giving it her
all.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
If I could make a request... May I continue
training for a little while longer?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
You're welcome to retire for the day if you'd like,
Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I can tell why she wants to put in some extra
training hours. So, with that in mind...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I can tell why she wants to put in some extra
training hours. So, with that in mind...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Why, thank you, Trainer! How terribly kind of
you.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: I won't be very long, I assure you.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And so, we train together until she's happy.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Oh... I see. So I was being too hasty.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Then, I shall proceed at my own pace, as you
recommend.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: This is our path, and we mustn't stray from it.
